title: Kolpop Bottle Lights 12 Packs, Cork Lights for Wine Bottles, 2m 20 LED Copper Wire Fairy Lights for Parties, Birthday, Wedding, Christmas DIY Table Centrepieces Indoor/Outdoor Decoration(Warm White)
features: Romantic Bottle Lights: 20 LED lamp beads, 2 meters long light string, just place it in an empty bottle. Simple decoration makes the home more warm and romantic
Battery Cork Lights: Bottle lights with cork is powered by 3 LR44 batteries, including batteries. Just install the batteries and turn on the switch to create a warm atmosphere

Suitable for a Variety of Bottles: The size of the cork bottle lights is 0.59-0.86 in, suitable for most bottles, including wine bottles, glass bottles, beer bottles, soda bottles, whisky bottles, jars and various other bottles

Easy to DIY: Made of high-quality copper wire, tough and not easy to break. Flexible and easy to shape into various shapes, you can DIY various shapes into the bottle, or you can wrap it around various crafts

Multi-Scene Application: Place the bottle fairy lights on the table, warm and bright, creating a romantic atmosphere. Wine bottle lights with cork is suitable for decorating birthdays, parties, weddings, barbecues, Halloween, Christmas
description: Product Description Cork stoppers fit most wine bottles, whiskey bottles, beer bottles and other bottles.
